title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB750r2, hEX lite
description: The RB750r2 (hEX lite) is a small five port ethernet router in a nice plastic case. Its price is lower than the RouterOS license alone - there simply is no choice when it comes to managing your wired home network, the RB750r2 (hEX lite) has it all Not only itâs affordable, small, good looking and easy to use - Itâs probably the most affordable MPLS capable router on the market! No more compromise between price and features - RB750r2 has both. With its compact design and clean looks, it will fit perfectly into any SOHO environment Box contains: RB750r2 in a plastic case, power supply
